auth.eula_agreement_text: By continuing, you agree to our
auth.eula_warning: . We have a zero-tolerance policy for objectionable content or abusive users.
auth.accept_terms_required: You must accept the terms and conditions to continue.
legal.privacy.s1_content: We collect information you provide directly to us when you create an account, update your profile, and use the CuriousZee platform. This includes your username, email address, profile picture, and the Q&A content (both anonymous and public) you submit or receive.
legal.privacy.s2_content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services. Specifically, we use it to facilitate anonymous and public Q&A interactions, personalize your feed, and enforce our strict anti-abuse policies.
legal.privacy.s3_content: CuriousZee has a zero-tolerance policy for objectionable content, cyberbullying, or abusive users. We actively monitor user reports. Content that violates our guidelines will be removed, and offending users will be permanently banned from the platform.
legal.privacy.s4_content: We do not sell your personal data. We only share information with third-party service providers (like Supabase for database hosting and Google AdMob for advertising) that help us operate our platform, or when required by law.
legal.privacy.s5_content: You can permanently delete your account and all associated data at any time through the Settings screen in the CuriosityZee app. Upon deletion, your profile, questions, and answers will be permanently removed from our servers.
legal.privacy.s6_content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@curiouszee.com.
legal.terms.s1_content: By accessing or using the CuriousZee application, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree to these terms, do not use our services.
legal.terms.s2_content: CuriousZee allows users to post questions and answers. You retain ownership of your content, but you grant CuriousZee a license to use, store, and display it. You are solely responsible for the content you generate.
legal.terms.s3_content:
There is no tolerance for objectionable content or abusive users. You agree NOT to post content that is: defamatory, bullying, harassing, sexually explicit, hate speech, or illegal.

We provide users with the ability to:
• Block abusive users
• Report objectionable content

CuriousZee moderators will act on reports within 24 hours by removing the content and ejecting the user who provided the offending content.
legal.terms.s4_content: You must provide accurate information when creating an account. You are responsible for safeguarding your password and for all activities that occur under your account. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate our terms.
legal.terms.s5_content: We may terminate or suspend your access to our Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation if you breach the Terms.
legal.terms.s6_content: The service is provided "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied. CuriousZee does not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, secure, or error-free.
profile_block.block_profile_confirm: Block this user? They won't be able to see your profile, send you questions, or follow you. They will also be removed from your followers and following.
profile_block.unblock_profile_confirm: Unblock this user? They will be able to see your profile and send you questions again.
profile_block.profile_not_available_desc: The profile you're looking for doesn't exist or is no longer available.
legal.support.title: Support & Account Deletion
legal.support.intro: This page allows you to contact our support team and request account deletion without needing to log in. This is provided in compliance with Google Play and App Store policies.
legal.support.s1_content:
If you need help with your account, have questions, or want to report an issue, you can reach us through:

1. Our official CuriousZee page — send us a message directly (no login required):
https://curiouszee.com/u/curiouszee

2. Email us at: support@curiouszee.com

Our team will respond within 48 hours.
legal.support.s2_content:
You can request the permanent deletion of your account by sending an email to support@curiouszee.com with the subject line "Account Deletion Request", or by sending us a message on our official page.

Please include the following information:
• Your username or registered email address
• The reason for deletion (optional)

Alternatively, if you have access to the app, you can delete your account directly from Settings > Delete Account.
legal.support.s3_title: 3. What Happens When Your Account Is Deleted
legal.support.s3_content:
When your account is deleted, the following data will be permanently removed from our servers:

• Your profile information (username, display name, bio, profile picture)
• All questions you have sent and received
• All answers you have provided
• Your followers and following lists
• All notification history

This action is irreversible and cannot be undone.
legal.support.s4_content: Account deletion requests submitted via email will be processed within 3 business days. You will receive a confirmation email once your account has been successfully deleted.
legal.support.email_error: Could not open email client. Please send an email manually to support@curiouszee.com.
legal.child_safety.title: Child Safety Standards
legal.child_safety.s1_content: Curious Zee is fully committed to protecting children and their safety. We maintain a zero-tolerance policy towards any content related to Child Sexual Abuse and Exploitation (CSAE), and we proactively work to prevent any potential abuse within our platform.
legal.child_safety.s2_content: The following is strictly prohibited: any Child Sexual Abuse Material (CSAM) including images, videos, and text; any content that depicts or promotes child exploitation in any form; any attempts to inappropriately contact or groom minors; any content intended to harm, threaten, or intimidate children.
legal.child_safety.s3_content: We use advanced filtering systems to detect and block violating content. We review user reports immediately and with the highest priority. We take strict and immediate action against any account found to violate this policy, including permanent bans.
legal.child_safety.s4_content:
Curious Zee provides reporting tools available to all users:

• In-app reporting: Users can report any suspicious question or content directly through the "Report" button available on every question and answer.
• User blocking: Users can immediately block anyone behaving inappropriately.
• Direct contact: Users can contact us via email at support@curiouszee.com or send a direct message to our official account at https://curiouszee.com/u/curiouszee to report any child safety concerns.
legal.child_safety.s5_content:
Upon detecting any violation of our child safety policy, we take the following actions:

• Immediate removal of the violating content.
• Suspension or permanent ban of the responsible account.
• Reporting the violation to the relevant authorities and law enforcement agencies.
• Full cooperation with law enforcement in related investigations.
• Preservation of necessary evidence in accordance with applicable laws.
legal.child_safety.s6_content: To report any child safety concerns or to inquire about our policies, please contact us via email at support@curiouszee.com or via our official account at https://curiouszee.com/u/curiouszee. We treat all reports related to child safety with the utmost seriousness, confidentiality, and urgency. Curious Zee complies with all local, regional, and international laws and regulations related to child protection.
